arts.ttl: Transfers news and rumours today: Fulham reject Andreas Pereira bid, Kepa Arrizabalaga's Bournemouth future, Leroy Sane to Galatasaray
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Palmeiras' bid for Fulham's Andreas Pereira, Kepa Arrizabalaga's Bournemouth future and Galatasaray's interest in Leroy Sane.
